name: Oriental Dressing and Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the Pace Picante Sauce, vegetable oil, soy sauce, white wine vinegar, and sugar in a bowl.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
3. Use this dressing as a marinade for crisp-tender cooked broccoli, mushrooms, or your favorite vegetable combinations. Alternatively, toss with mixed green salads.
